voxy.config.title: Voxy
voxy.config.general.serviceThreads.toolt: Number of threads the ServiceThreadPool can use
voxy.config.general.useSodiumBuilder.too: Uses sodium builder threads as part of voxys thread pool, can reduce stuttering and lag when moving quickly at high render distance
voxy.config.general.ingest.tooltip: Enables or disables voxies ability to convert new chunks into LoDs
voxy.config.general.subDivisionSize.tool: Maximum size in pixels (squared) of screenspace AABB before subdiving to smaller LoDs (Smaller being higher quality)
voxy.config.general.renderDistance.toolt: Render distance of voxy in chunks
voxy.config.general.renderPressure.toolt: Controls Voxy's per-frame LOD build pressure, including top-level node processing rate and render-thread model baking budget. Lower values prioritize FPS and reduce stutter while moving; higher values make LODs catch up faster. This option is hot-reloadable.
voxy.config.general.environmental_fog.to: Enables or disables voxy rendering environmental fog
voxy.config.general.ssao_mode.tooltip: The mode used for screenspace ambient occlusion (Auto attempts to pick the best option while reducing performance impact)
voxy.config.general.adaptCloudDistance.t: Enables or disables adaptive cloud distance
voxy.config.general.cloudDistance.toolti: Cloud distance in chunks (Only used if adaptive cloud distance is disabled)
voxy.config.general.fogIntensity.tooltip: Intensity of the fog, higher values make the fog thicker and reduce visibility
voxy.config.general.fogDensity.tooltip: Density of the fog, higher values make the fog thicker
voxy.config.general.skyFogDistance.toolt: Distance at which sky fog starts to render in chunks
voxy.config.fakesight.enabled.tooltip: FakeSight-style support: reports a larger view/request distance so the server sends more chunks for Voxy LOD ingestion.
voxy.config.fakesight.distance.tooltip: Chunk distance reported to the server or integrated server. Higher values load more chunks and increase CPU, memory and network load.
